www.protocol.policy.content:
1. Information Collection

When you visit our website, we may collect the following information:

Personal information you provide, such as your name, email address, phone number, etc.;

Information automatically collected through cookies and other technologies, such as your IP address, browser type, access time and date, type of device used, etc.


We use this information to:

(1)Respond to your inquiries;

(2)Provide you with requested services;

(3)Process orders and payments;

(4)Send updates and promotional information;

(5)Improve our website and services;

(6)Provide you with personalized experiences.


2. Information Sharing

We may share your personal information with the following third parties:

(1)We may share your personal information with the following third parties:

(2)Vendors and service providers who support and provide services to us;

(3)Legal, regulatory, law enforcement, and government agencies who need to protect our rights, property, or safety.

*We promise not to sell, exchange, or rent your information. We will take appropriate measures to ensure the security of the third party receiving your personal information.


3. Data Storage and Security

We will take reasonable measures to protect your personal information, including:

(1)Using technologies such as password protection, data encryption, physical and electronic access controls to protect your personal information;

(2)Storing your personal information on servers and taking necessary security measures to prevent unauthorized access, use, modification, disclosure, or destruction;

(3)Regularly reviewing and updating our security measures to ensure their effectiveness.


4. Cookies and Other Technologies

We may use cookies and other technologies to enhance your browsing experience. For example, we use cookies to:

(1)Remember your login information;

(2)Save your shopping cart information;

(3)Identify your preferences and interests;

(4)Collect statistical information about website usage.

*You can refuse cookies by setting your browser preferences, but this may affect your browsing experience.


5. Privacy Access and Correction

You may access and correct your personal information at any time. If you wish to access or correct your information, please contact us through our contact information.


6. Privacy Policy Changes

We may update this privacy policy periodically. We will post any changes on our website, and you will be deemed to have accepted the updated privacy policy.
www.protocol.policy.title: Privacy Policy
www.protocol.service.content:
Welcome to use Flytrade, a service provided by Shenzhen Qifeifan Technology Co., Ltd. (hereinafter referred to as "Flytrade"). This User Service Agreement (hereinafter referred to as "Agreement") is a legal agreement between you and Flytrade. Please read this Agreement carefully before using Flytrade service. By using Flytrade service, you agree to be bound by this Agreement. If you do not agree to be bound by this Agreement, please do not use Flytrade service.


1. Service Content

Flytrade is an online trading platform that provides users with product information, transaction services, and other related services. Users can use Flytrade to browse product information, communicate with suppliers, place orders, and make payments.


2. User Qualifications

Users of Flytrade must be individuals or legal entities with full capacity for civil conduct. If you do not have full capacity for civil conduct, please do not use Flytrade service.


3. User Registration

To use Flytrade service, users need to complete the registration process and obtain a Flytrade account. Users should provide accurate and complete information during the registration process. Users are responsible for maintaining the security of their account information and passwords. Flytrade will not be responsible for any losses caused by users' failure to keep their account information and passwords secure.


4. User Behavior

Users shall use Flytrade service in compliance with laws, regulations, and this Agreement. Users shall not engage in any behavior that violates the legitimate rights and interests of others, infringes intellectual property rights, or violates laws and regulations. Users shall not use Flytrade service to engage in any illegal or fraudulent activities.


5. Service Interruption and Termination

Flytrade may suspend or terminate Flytrade service in whole or in part at any time for any reason, with or without notice to users. Flytrade shall not be liable to users or any third party for any damages arising from the suspension or termination of Flytrade service.


6. Disclaimer

(1) Users understand and agree that Flytrade will not be responsible for any service interruption or user data loss caused by force majeure or other uncontrollable reasons.


(2) Users understand and agree that Flytrade will not be responsible for any indirect, special, incidental, or consequential losses caused by users' use of Flytrade service, including but not limited to loss of profits, business reputation, and business opportunities.


(3) Flytrade makes no express or implied warranties with respect to the services provided by Flytrade, including but not limited to the applicability, accuracy, timeliness, security, completeness, confidentiality, etc. of the services.


(4) Agreement Modification


(5) Flytrade has the right to modify the terms of this Agreement based on actual situations. Once this Agreement is modified, Flytrade will publish the latest Agreement terms on its website, and users should check them regularly.


(6) If users do not agree with the modifications made by Flytrade to the Agreement terms, they should stop using Flytrade service. If users continue to use Flytrade service, they will be deemed to have accepted the modifications made to the Agreement terms.


(7) Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


(8) The formation, performance, and interpretation of this Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the People's Republic of China.


(9)  Any dispute arising from this Agreement shall be resolved through friendly consultation. If consultation fails, either party may bring a lawsuit to the court with jurisdiction.


Contact Information of Flytrade:

Company Name: Shenzhen Qifeifan Technology Co., Ltd.

English Name: Flytrade

Address: LongHua District, Shenzhen City, Guangdong Province, China

Email: info@sslfly.com
www.protocol.service.title: User Service Agreement

www.protocol.faq.question: 我們在哪裡？
www.protocol.faq.answer: 我們為全球範圍內的智能手錶服務提供總部位於迪拜，並在廣州和深圳設有主要辦公地址。如果您需要前來拜訪，請通過發送電子郵件至ccit.flytrade@gmail.com與我們聯繫。

www.protocol.faq.question: 如何下訂單？
www.protocol.faq.answer: 我們的網站目前仍在發展初期，暫不支持網站支付。我們的開發團隊正在努力開發中，未來我們將會支持網站支付。如果您需要下單，請聯繫我們的銷售經理，我們的銷售團隊會隨時為您服務。

www.protocol.faq.question: 如何註冊、如何登錄、如何更改密碼？
www.protocol.faq.answer:
如何註冊？
在我們的網站首頁右上角點擊“用戶ICON”的圖標。
填寫您的個人信息，包括電子郵件地址和密碼。
閱讀並同意我們的服務條款和隱私政策。
點擊“註冊”按鈕。

如何登錄？
在我們的網站首頁點擊“登錄”按鈕。
輸入您的電子郵件地址和密碼。
點擊“登錄”按鈕。

如何更改密碼？
在登錄後，進入“我的賬戶”頁面。
點擊“更改密碼”按鈕。
輸入當前密碼和新密碼，並確認新密碼。
點擊“更改密碼”按鈕，保存更改。

www.protocol.faq.question: 關於網站條款、聯繫我們、合作機會的問題？
www.protocol.faq.answer:
關於網站條款：
請訪問我們網站的“隱私政策和用戶服務協議”頁面。

關於聯繫我們：
如果您需要幫助或有任何問題，請通過我們的網站聯繫頁面與我們聯繫（ccit.flytrade@gmail.com）。我們的客戶支持團隊會盡快回复您的郵件。

關於合作機會：
如果您有與我們的業務有關的合作機會，請通過我們的網站聯繫頁面與我們聯繫（ccit.flytrade@gmail.com）。我們將盡快回复您的郵件，提供一切資源為您服務，並與您討論合作事宜。

www.protocol.faq.question: 如何提交問題、如何联系客戶支持，以及相關解決方案？
www.protocol.faq.answer:
您可以通過我們的網站聯繫頁面與我們聯繫（ccit.flytrade@gmail.com）。請盡可能詳細地描述您遇到的問題，我們的客戶支持團隊會盡快回复您的郵件，並提供相關解決方案。

如何联系客戶支持？

如果您需要幫助或有任何問題，請通過我們的網站聯繫頁面與我們聯繫（ccit.flytrade@gmail.com）。我們的客戶支持團隊會盡快回复您的郵件，並提供相關解決方案。

相關解決方案？

我們的客戶支持團隊將根據您的問題提供相關的解決方案，並為您提供支持和幫助。我們也會在我們的網站FAQ中提供一些常見問題和解決方案，以幫助您更快地解決問題。

company.basic.work_location: Block C, Huaqiang Plaza, No. 1019 Huaqiang North Road, Hua Hang Community, Huaqiang North Street, Futian District, Shenzhen
www.cooperate.common_description:
CCIT.Flytrade是一家專注於智能手錶產品研發的企業，總部設在迪拜，同時在廣州和深圳設有辦公室。 Flytrade致力於為全球消費者提供高品質的智能手錶產品和服務，涵蓋運動健康、生活休閒等多個場景，為用戶打造出色的智能手錶體驗。

作為行業領先者，CCIT.Flytrade在智能手錶技術方面擁有廣泛的經驗和專業知識，致力於提供高性能、高質量的產品和解決方案，為用戶提供全方位的智能手錶體驗。同時，CCIT.Flytrade秉持合作共贏的理念，願意與世界各地的合作夥伴攜手合作，共同推動智能手錶行業的發展，共創更美好的未來。
www.cooperate.technology_content_descrip:
1、為智能手錶開發一款應用程序，讓用戶可以通過手錶進行健康監測、運動記錄、社交聊天等操作。
2、為手錶建設一套電子商務平台，讓用戶可以在平台上瀏覽、購買手錶產品，以及進行在線支付等操作。
3、為手錶建設一套產品數據管理系統，用於管理手錶的生產、銷售、庫存等相關數據。
4、對公司現有的基礎設施進行升級和維護，包括網絡、服務器、存儲等設備。
www.cooperate.market_content_description:
1、建立與其他手錶品牌的合作夥伴關係，進行產品推廣和市場營銷；
2、與電商平台合作，開展手錶產品的銷售活動，增加產品曝光度和銷售量；
3、與時尚媒體、社交媒體、博客等合作，增加品牌知名度和曝光度；
4、參加手錶展覽會、時尚活動等相關行業活動，增加品牌影響力和認可度。
www.cooperate.technology_require_descrip:
1、具備相關的應用程序設計和開發經驗，熟悉智能手錶操作系統，能夠根據手錶硬件特性進行優化，確保應用程序的穩定性和性能。
2、具備相關的電商平台設計和開發經驗，能夠根據公司業務需求進行定制開發，確保平台的安全性和穩定性。
3、具備相關的數據管理系統設計和開發經驗，能夠根據公司業務需求進行定制開發，確保系統的安全性和穩定性。
4、具備相關的基礎設施升級和維護經驗，能夠快速響應並解決設備故障，確保公司業務的正常進行。
www.cooperate.market_require_description:
1、具有市場營銷和推廣經驗，了解手錶行業和市場；
2、具備與其他品牌和電商平台的溝通和協商能力；
3、具備良好的人際交往能力，能夠與時尚媒體、社交媒體、博客等建立合作關係；
4、具備較強的組織和協調能力，能夠組織和參加相關行業活動；
5、具備一定的英語水平，能夠進行跨國合作和交流。
www.cooperate.supplier_content_descripti:
1、供應商背景：介紹供應商的公司背景，包括公司規模、產品線、質量控制體系、生產能力等信息。
2、產品種類：明確需要的手錶種類及款式，例如男女錶、機械表、電子表、運動表等。
3、產品質量：對手錶的品質要求進行詳細描述，包括外觀、材質、工藝、功能等方面。
4、品牌合作：如果需要進行品牌合作，要求供應商提供相應的品牌授權和營銷支持。
www.cooperate.supplier_require_descripti:
1、價格要求：確定合理的價格範圍，同時要求供應商提供具有競爭力的報價。
2、供貨週期：確定供應商的供貨週期和穩定性，以確保供應的及時性和連續性。
3、客戶服務：要求供應商提供完善的客戶服務體系，包括售前、售中、售後服務，以及維修和保養支持。
4、合同條款：在確定合作意向後，簽署供應合同，明確雙方的權利和義務，以及違約責任和解決方案。
www.company.video_description: Flytrade是一家充滿活力和創新的企業，它以用戶為中心，致力於為用戶提供優質的服務和產品。 Flytrade相信在不久的將來，它將成為一家偉大的企業，並研發出更多優秀的產品，為用戶貢獻更多價值！
company.basic.company_introduce: 在2020年，我們身為大學生創業者，創立了“Fly珠科”項目（微信小程序），旨在更好地服務在校學生，幫助有需求的同學解決問題，同時為貧困學生提供賺錢的機會。這個項目給我們的團隊帶來了不少的流量和效益。隨後，我們正式成立了啟飛帆技術有限公司。到了2021年，我們將目光放得更遠，與CCIT品牌合作，開啟了外貿路線，創立了“飛貿Flytrade”項目，並決定開始研發我們自己的產品。在探索和創新的路上，我們從未停止腳步！
company.basic.company_mission:
為用戶創造出色的產品
為員工營造愉悅進取的工作氛圍
為合作夥伴建立互信共贏的合作平台
為股東提供長期穩健的回報
company.basic.company_vision: 我們的追求是成為一個全球領先的、持續發展和致力於健康事業的企業
company.basic.company_core: 以用戶為導向，以設計驅動創新，不斷學習進步

company.main_members.index.name: 鄭凡
company.main_members.index.responsibility: 對公司的成敗負責。所有公司運作、市場、戰略、財務、企業文化的創立、人力資源、僱用、解聘及遵守安全法規、銷售、公共關係等等。
company.main_members.index.introduction: 鄭凡先生是Flytrade的傑出創始人之一，同時也是聯合創始人和董事會主席。他具備豐富的經驗和卓越的管理能力，其職業生涯長期與大型客機公司緊密相連。他憑藉著獨具遠見的策略思維和在世界最大公司的架構中積累的豐富經驗，在創建Flytrade過程中取得了卓越成就。鄭凡先生酷愛最新科技、熱衷運動和汽車，從偉人身上獲取靈感，始終不放棄，堅信只要具備決心和時間，人生中任何目標都可以實現。

company.company_history.index.title: 起帆
company.company_history.index.description: 我們幾位在校大學生共同創建了深圳啟帆科技有限公司，旨在為校內學生提供更好的服務和解決問題，並為有需要的學生創造賺錢機會。我們的目標是創業並帶來實實在在的幫助和改變。

company.company_history.index.title: 校園項目
company.company_history.index.description: 作為富有遠見的校園創業者，我們通過創建“Fly珠科”微信小程序和校園論壇，為在校學生提供更優質的服務和創收機會，並促進同學們之間的交流和合作。我們的努力獲得了顯著成果，校內聲譽迅速擴散。

company.company_history.index.title: 科技發展
company.company_history.index.description: 為了穩步快速地發展公司，我們致力於開發全新的業務系統，包括前台展示系統（官網、商城），後台管理系統、ERP管理系統、權限管理系統、前台配置系統等，以高效地管理和發展業務。

company.company_history.index.title: CCIT.Flytrade
company.company_history.index.description: 我們成功開發了成熟的外貿系統，並進入市場開發新產品。與CCIT合作創建了CCIT.Flytrade項目（Flytrade），並進一步研發和銷售手錶，為市場提供更多高質量的產品。

store.index.banner.title: N9 ULTRA PRO
store.index.banner.description: 多功能表，滿足多樣化需求

www.protocol.sales.content:
Welcome to the official website of Flytrade!

Here, we provide you with high-quality products and excellent service. Please read the following sales policy carefully before making a purchase:


1. Orders and Payments: Placing an order on our website signifies your agreement to purchase the selected products. We strive to ensure accurate product information on our website, but we reserve the right to correct errors and cancel orders if necessary.We accept various payment methods, including credit cards, debit cards, Alipay, and other international payment methods. You can choose your preferred payment method at the checkout page.


2. Prices and Currencies: All product prices are subject to market adjustments. We support other major currencies such as US Dollars (USD), Euros (EUR), and more. You can select your desired currency at the checkout page.Please note that currency exchange rates may cause slight variations between the displayed price and the final price.


3. Shipping and Delivery: We strive to process and ship your order as soon as possible after receiving payment. The delivery time depends on your location and the chosen shipping method.Shipping fees are calculated based on the weight, dimensions, and destination of the order and will be displayed at the checkout page. Please note that international shipping may incur additional customs duties and taxes, which are the responsibility of the buyer.


4. Returns and Refunds: If you encounter any quality issues with the received products, please contact us within 7 working days after receiving the goods. We will do our best to resolve the issue and provide return or refund services.When returning a product, it must be in its original condition and accompanied by complete packaging and accessories. Refunds will be processed upon confirmation of receiving the returned item and conducting an inspection.


5. Privacy Protection: We highly value the protection of your personal information. When using our website, we employ appropriate security measures to safeguard your information and only use it when necessary.Please refer to our Privacy Policy for more information on how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.


If you have any questions or need further assistance regarding the above sales policy, please feel free to contact us via the following means:

  • Email: info@sslfly.com
  • Phone: +86 18903011871

Thank you for choosing Flytrade! We look forward to providing you with outstanding products and services.


Please note that the above sales policy may be subject to adjustments and updates as needed. The latest version of the sales policy will always be published on our website.
www.protocol.sales.title: Sales Policy
